name: gecko-copy-trade-grader
description: Rigor-graded scorecard for any public crypto copy-trader or trading bot. Pulls OKX smartmoney leaderboards (or accepts manual per-trade input), computes Sharpe / max-DD / catastrophic-rate / stability / selection-deflated Sharpe, outputs A/B/C/D grade. Use before clicking 'Copy' on OKX — empirically only 11% of OKX top-50 leaderboard appearances are persistently skilled.
author: Gecko
triggers: Should I copy this OKX trader
Run rigor on the OKX leaderboard
Show me Gecko-Rank vs OKX-Rank delta
Find the most underrated traders on OKX
Cross-period stability of OKX top traders
